meaning: n.上升,(地位,声望等的)提高,攀登,上坡路
examples: Burke pushed the button and the lift began its slow ascent.
The long ascent to the Alp from there seemed very weary and far to the traveller.
Several members of the celebrity group suffered from altitude sickness during the five-day ascent.
At some point in his ascent through corporate Brazil, however, Stadnik decided he wanted something more.
